title: The One Where No One Proposes

lines.text: Rachel's Room, Joey moves Ross's coat to get the tissues Rachel wants and the engagement ring box Mrs. Geller gave him falls out of the pocket it was inside. Joey goes to one knee, picks up the box, opens it, and sees that it's an engagement ring.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey.
He turns to face Rachel on one knee with the box open.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (seeing the ring) Oh my God. (Pause) Okay.
Joey is stunned.
[Cut to Ross getting of an elevator carrying a bouquet of flowers and walking down the hall to Rachel's room.]
[Cut back into Rachel's room.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So uh...I guess we should...make it official huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh... Look Rach...(Ross enters.) Hey Ross is here! Hey look! It's my good friend Ross. Hey Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Joey. (To Rachel) Hey you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey and look he brought flowers. Thanks Ross, but I'm really more of a candy guy. (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're weird today. (He turns to Rachel and Joey puts the ring back.) (To Rachel) Listen I uh, wanted to talk to you about something.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh yeah, actually I kinda need to talk to you too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh Joey, can you give us just a minute?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. I meant no.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering with everyone else including Mr. Geller) Hi! Hey look who's here!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Where's my granddaughter? I've been practicing my magic tricks.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He pulled a quarter out of my ear!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, where's uh, where's mom?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: She went to pick up Aunt Liddy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, Aunt Liddy's coming? That means we get five dollars each!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: So when do I get to meet Emma and show her this? (Pulls a bouquet of flowers out of his sleeve.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Wow.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh Dad, Emma's in the nursery. I'll take you now. If you want, but (To Rachel) I really want to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, I still need to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey but, before you guys do that (To Rachel) I need to talk to you, and Ross, I need to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Monica) Oh and I need to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: To see if know what these guys are talking about.
Opening Credits
Outside the Nursery, everyone but Rachel is standing and looking into the window.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Isn't she beautiful?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Look at her, my first grandchild.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What about Ben?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Well of course Ben, I meant my first granddaughter. (To Monica, mouths) Wow.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (taking Ross aside) Have umm, have you thought anymore about you and Rachel?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh well yeah, actually I was going to talk to her when you guys all came in the room.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yay! It's so exciting! Wow, you could've done that with us there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh sure okay, you can touch yourself in front of us but you can't talk to Rachel.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! When have I ever touched myself in front of you guys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh please! Just before when you were asleep in the lounge! That Armenian family was watching you instead of the TV. Oh, that reminds me. That Mr. Hasmeje still has my Gameboy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (taking Chandler aside) Hey Chandler, can I talk to you for a second?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude I just did something terrible.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was you?! I thought it was Jack!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No, that was Jack! Rachel thinks I asked her to marry me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?! Why does she think that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Because it kinda looked like I did.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Again, what?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay well, I was down on one knee with the ring in my hand...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: As we all are at some point during the day.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It wasn't my ring! It fell out of Ross's jacket! And when I knelt down to pick it up Rachel thought I was proposing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross had a ring?! And he was gonna propose?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I guess.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And you did it first?! This is gonna kill him! You know how much he loves to propose!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! I know it's awful.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, what did she say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (happily) She said yes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Does Ross know?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh God, what the hell am I going to tell him?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well maybe you don't have to tell him anything.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I like that. Yeah...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: If you clear things up with Rachel then Ross never needs to find out, but you have to do it now before he hears about it and kicks your ass!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) Now let's not get carried away. (He walks away as Monica comes over and hugs Chandler from behind.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I want a baby.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Honey, we've been over this. I need to be facing the other way.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on! Come on, if we have sex again it'll double our chances of getting pregnant. Do you think that closet's still available?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm so tired. (She starts kissing him.) Yeah okay, but no foreplay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Deal!
[Back in front of the nursery window.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dad seriously! Y'know you really should see someone about that!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Noted.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I wanna go talk to Rachel for a minute, are you gonna be okay alone for a bit?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Are you kidding me, I could stay and look at her forever.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (noticing something) Actually umm... (He turns Mr. Geller's head to look at Emma.)
Rachel's Room, Phoebe is entering.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you all right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uhh... I think I just got engaged.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! He did it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well...did you know he was gonna ask me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you kidding? I'm like the one who talked him into it. I like to think of myself as the puppet master of the group.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And you really think this is a good idea?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just talked him into it, don't tell me I have to do you too. The puppet master gets tired people.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I just don't know! It just doesn't feel right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why?! You two are so meant to be together, everybody thinks so.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?! Even Ross?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Especially Ross!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Oh uh, hey Pheebs. Uh y'know what? I'll-I'll come back later. (He goes to leave but runs into Ross who's entering.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! Kind of uh, kind of a full house here. I'll guess just...I'll come back. (Ross exits followed by Joey.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There he goes, your fiancee.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Although he does play with himself in his sleep.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I can't say that I'm surprised.
A hallway, Joey and Ross find Mr. Geller with his ear up against a janitor's closet door.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dad, what are you doing?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: I think there are people in there having sex.
Ross turns to look at Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It can't be me, I'm standing right here.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Wanna peek?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? I don't like you without mom. (To Joey) Come on. (Walks away.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross) We're not peeking? (Follows him.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Well I'm peeking. (He peeks.) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello sir, you know Monica.
Rachel's Room, she is taking the ring out of Ross's jacket, looks at it, and puts it on her finger as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey uh, is it okay to come in?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Of course! Oh Joey, this ring I...it's beautiful I love it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah uh look Rach, there's something I gotta tell ya.
There's a knock on the door and a nurse enters carrying Emma.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: Hey! Are you ready to try nursing again?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Hi Emma. Hey, why do you think she won't take my breast?

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: It's all right honey, it takes some babies a while to get it, but don't worry. It'll happen.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (watching) Yowsa! (Looks away.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay sweetie, you can do it. Just open up and put it in your mouth.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dear Lord.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry honey, what were you saying?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh uh-uh yeah, I think that...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh look, she's pulling away again! Do you think my nipples are too big for her mouth? (Joey gets embarrassed.) She looks scared. Doesn't she look scared?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, I don't really know her.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: Why don't we try massaging the breast to stimulate the flow. (Does so.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To God) Are you kidding me?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's just so frustrating! Why doesn't she want my breast?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know! Maybe she's crazy! (Storms out.)
The Lobby, Ross is eating a sandwich as Phoebe rushes up to him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey! Wait up!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Congratulations! I didn't want to say anything in front of Joey 'cause I didn't know if he knew yet.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What, that we had a baby? Come on let's give him a little credit, although, he did eat a piece of plastic fruit earlier.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! No, that you and Rachel are engaged!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, it's a secret. Oh goodie! Yes! We haven't done the secret thing in a long time.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Phoebe, there is no secret. Okay? I didn't propose.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you lying? Is this like that time you tried to convince us that you were a doctor?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pause) I am a doctor! Y'know what? I'm just gonna go and talk to Rachel myself.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, me too. (They go into her room and see that she's sleeping.) Should we wake her up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No, come on let her sleep! She's so exhausted.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And so engaged. (Points to the ring that Rachel is wearing.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? (Motions for Phoebe to go outside with him.) Oh my God! She-she thinks we're engaged! Why? Why? Why would she think we're engaged?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Perhaps because you gave her an engagement ring? Y'know Ross doctors are supposed to be smart.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I didn't give her that ring!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So whose ring is it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's mine.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Is it an engagement ring?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But you didn't give it to her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But you were going to propose?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Huh, I might be losing interest in this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look. Look, my mom gave me that ring because she wanted me to propose to Rachel, but all I wanted to do is if she maybe...kinda...wanted ah...start...things up again.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, what beautiful lukewarm sentiment.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I didn't want to rush into anything. And it seemed like she didn't want to either. But I don't, I don't understand how any of this happened! What? Did she find the ring in my jacket, assume that I was going to propose, throw it on, and-and just start telling people?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! No, she said you actually proposed to her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I didn't! I didn't propose! (Pause) Unless uh... (Pause) Did I? I haven't slept in forty hours and...it does sound like something I would do.
Commercial Break
The Janitor's Closet, Chandler and Monica are trying to figure out what to do now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, we can't stay in here forever.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I still can't believe my dad saw us having sex! He didn't make it to one of piano recitals, but this he sees!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is okay. We're all adults here; there's nothing to be ashamed of. Now, let's put our underwear in our pockets and walk out the door. (They do so and find Mr. Geller leaning against a wall stunned.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi Dad! I can still call you that right?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Of course. I'll always be your dad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I just want you to know that what you witnessed in there, that wasn't for fun.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It wasn't fun?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Why? Why-why-would you-Wh-why... (To Mr. Geller) Look, I just don't want you to think that we're animals who do it whenever we want.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Oh, I don't think that. Before today I never thought of you two having sex at all. It was a simpler time.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The truth is, Dad, we're-we're trying.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, we're trying to get pregnant.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Oh my God! This is so exciting! Well, get back in there! (Points to the closet) I'll guard the door!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, that's okay dad, we-we can wait until later.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Whoa-whoa-whoa! I don't think so! Aren't you ovulating?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Daddy?!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Well you gotta get at it princess! When your mother and I were trying to conceive you, whenever she was ovulating, bam, we did it. That's how I got my bad hip.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's funny, this conversation's how I got the bullet hole in my head.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: This one time I had my knee up on the sink and your mother, she was...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Daddy! I don't think we need to hear about the specific positions you and mom had sex.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: You're right, you're right. This is about your positions. Now, what I saw in the closet is not the optimum position for conceiving a child, although it might feel good.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I don't feel good right now.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: But pleasure is important, (To Chandler) and it helps if the woman has an orgasm. You up to the task sailor?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Seriously sir, my brains? All over the wall.
Rachel's Room, Monica is entering.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey. I need to tell you something.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, now's a good time. I'm on my way to have my ears cut off.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey asked me marry him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey proposed to me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is he crazy?! You just had Ross's baby!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I-I said yes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! Are you crazy? You just had Ross's baby! It's-it's so inappropriate. No, it's worse than that. It's wrong. It's... It is bigger than mine! (Rachel's engagement ring.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. Days of Our Lives, thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You can't marry him!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why not? I don't want to do this alone! And he's such a sweet guy and he loves me so much.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well do you love him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sure?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I mean whatever.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey, the question is...do you really want to marry Joey?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. No, I don't. Could you be a dear and go tell him?
A Hallway, Chandler is following Joey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You still haven't told Rachel you weren't really proposing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! She had the ring on, she seemed so excited, and then she took her breast out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey, you have to tell her what's going on! And what did it look like?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I didn't look at it. Stupid baby's head was blocking most of it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Go and tell Rachel right now before Ross finds out.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, it's not that easy. She said she wanted to marry me. I don't want to hurt her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, look, just do it gently.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're right. You're right. I-I'll go tell her now before Ross finds out and I'll be gentle. I can do that. I am a gentle person. Oh, by the way. Two people screwing in there (Points to the closet Chandler and Monica were in) if you want to check that out.
Rachel's Room, Ross is entering.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, I um... I heard about the engagement.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Surprised?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And confused. Rach, sweetie, I-I um...I didn't propose to you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't think you do.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You didn't propose to me. Joey did.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Poor baby, you're so tired. Rach, I didn't propose to you, Joey didn't propose to you, and Chandler didn't propose to you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh... You didn't propose to me, Chandler didn't propose to me, but Joey did.
Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey proposed to you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can come back.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, wait! Wait-wait-wait! Joey, did you propose to her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes you did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Actually, technically, I didn't.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then why did you give me a ring?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait! Whoa-whoa, you...you gave her the ring?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No, and I did not ask her to marry me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I didn't!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I didn't!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did! And don't you say, "No, I didn't!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ahhh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He was right there. He got down on one knee and proposed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whoa! You were down on one knee?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, that looks bad. But I didn't...I didn't propose!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Then what did happen?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, what did happen?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, the ring fell on the floor and I went down to pick it up and you thought I was proposing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, but you said, "Will you marry me?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I didn't!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I didn't!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did-Oh my God you didn't! (Screams) Well then why didn't you tell me that before?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well I tried, but people kept coming in and then you took your breast out!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whoa! Hey! Whoa-whoa-whoa, you saw her breast?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross) I'll tell you about it later. Be cool.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then Joey, what the hell were you doing with an engagement ring?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It wasn't my ring! It's Ross's ring! That's why I felt so bad Rach, because he was going to propose.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You were gonna propose to me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhh... No.
An awkward silence follows.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, this is awkward. {See? I told you so.}

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: But I-I was going to see if y'know, maybe you uh, start dating again but that-I mean that-that was all, Rach.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude, step up! I proposed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, you didn't!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh that's right. There's a lot going on here and I think I ate some bad fruit earlier.
There's a knock on the door and the Nurse enters carrying Emma.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: Hey, she just woke up! She's hungry. Why don't we give this another try?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Joey) I can't believe you told her I was going to propose!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't believe you're not going to propose!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, I'm not going to rush into anything!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, dude, I totally understand. Usually after I have a baby with a woman I like to slow things down!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's doing it Look, she's breast-feeding look!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looking at the ceiling) Ah, it's beautiful.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: I'll come back for her later.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you. (The nurse exits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow, this feels weird.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good weird?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wonderful weird.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what you guys? I'm uh, I'm gonna go too. And uh, I'm sorry about everything.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey don't worry, it was my mistake.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, Rach, I should've told you sooner. It's just that...Man! That kid is going to town! (Joey makes his awkward exit.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's perfect.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We're so lucky.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We really are.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I-I know it's not a proposal and I don't know where you are, but with everything that's been going on and with Emma and...I've been feeling...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. I know. I've feeling...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. (Laughs nervously)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, well, that... Wow, okay, well, umm...then maybe, at least we can, we can talk about us again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, maybe.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well good, okay. I-I, kind of think y'know if we...if... You're wearing the ring.
Pause.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh-what's that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And you told Phoebe you were engaged.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry, what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When you thought Joey proposed did...did you say yes?
Closing Credits
Outside the Janitor's Closet, there are people having sex and Mr. Geller is trying to give them some pamphlets.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Kids, I spoke to a doctor and picked up this pamphlets on how to get pregnant. (He slides them under the door.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (walking by with Chandler.) Hey dad!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: (pause) Sorry to bother you again, but could you pass my pamphlets back? (They do so.) Thank you.
End
